creator: bozhin@mail.bg
text:
FreeBSD 8.0-RC3 does not seem to fix this problem, things are even  
getting worse:
now installer cannot detect my CD/DVD drive, which is External Super  
Multi DVD Rewriter, by LG - model GSA - E50L).
However, if I connect serial ata disk to this motherboard, I can  
successfully install FreeBSD 8.0-RC3 from a passive FTP - thus the  
problem seems to only be relevant to the on-board PATA disk  
controller. And since FreeBSD 8.0-RC3 there is a new problem with at  
least this USB DVD drive.


-------------------------------------

횕챨챤척책챰챔챤챠횪챘책챠 횛챤챰챵챔챠찾 챌횪 23 챰챵챤챵챔챠챗챔 챠횪 채책챠 챰 횆횆횗, 18 GB 챙첼챰챵챤,
횒책챤찾챨횪챠챔첨책챠 챵챨횪척챔챗 챔 횁책챌챦챘횪챵책챠 채챤챙책챕챠
